news.headline: Zūm introduces advanced safety features for school buses during National School Bus Safety Week (Oct. 21-25, 2024).
news.summary: A leading student transportation provider, Zūm, based in REDWOOD CITY, Calif., has introduced innovative communication tools to enhance safety during school commutes. In line with National School Bus Safety Week from Oct. 21-25, Zūm aims to ensure secure trips for students.

news.headline: Industry veteran Kelvin Dickenson appointed new Chief Product Officer at StarCompliance, leading product innovation.
news.summary: Kelvin Dickenson has been appointed as the Chief Product Officer at StarCompliance, a prominent company offering employee compliance technology solutions. The announcement was made on October 21, 2024, in Rockville, Maryland. Dickenson, an experienced industry professional, will be leading product development at Star.

news.headline: Rimini Street (Nasdaq: RMNI) to report Q3 2024 financial results on October 30 at 5:00 p.m. Eastern / 2:00 p.m. Pacific time.
news.summary: Global provider of enterprise software support and innovation solutions, Rimini Street, Inc. (Nasdaq: RMNI), is set to release its earnings after the market closes on October 30, 2024. A conference call and webcast will follow, scheduled for 5:00 p.m. Eastern / 2:00 p.m. Pacific time on the same date to discuss the third quarter 2024 results and the fourth quarter 2024 outlook. Interested parties can tune in to a live webcast of the event on Rimini Street’s Investor Relations website.

news.headline: New 20,000 sq ft transmission service center by ATSI in MahoningCounty will centralize resources to speed up service response in Ohio.
news.summary: Located within Ohio Edison's service area in Akron, a new 20,000-square-foot operations service center has been completed by American Transmission Systems, Inc. (ATSI), a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp. The facility was finished in October 21, 2024. This center will play a crucial role in supporting operations within the region.

news.headline: WallachBeth Capital closes Bullfrog AI offering and private placement for $3.13 million, supports drug development.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, in Jersey City, New Jersey, WallachBeth Capital LLC, a prominent firm offering capital markets and institutional execution services, disclosed news about BullFrog AI Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:BFRG; BFRGW), also known as Bullfrog AI. Bullfrog AI, a company focused on technology-driven drug development, was the subject of the announcement.

news.headline: Okami Medical closes $32.5M financing with Vensana Capital leading, joined by other investors.
news.summary: In Aliso Viejo, California on October 21, 2024, Okami Medical revealed the completion of a $32.5 million funding round. This financing was spearheaded by Vensana Capital, a new investor, with participation from existing investors like U.S. Venture Partners, Okami's board members, and other notable figures in the medical device sector.

news.headline: Suburban female voters in battleground states demand FDA action to stop illegal disposable vapes. They are more likely to vote for candidates addressing the issue.
news.summary: In Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Georgia, suburban women are showing strong interest in supporting candidates who promise to address the issue of illegal disposable vapes. A recent study indicates that this group of voters is particularly concerned about the problem. The women are likely to vote for a candidate who takes action to stop this issue. This suggests that politicians who prioritize tackling the influx of illegal disposable vapes may resonate with suburban female voters in these key states.

news.headline: SDL unveils revamped website for better user experience. Leading local government software provider commits to innovation.
news.summary: In Berkeley Heights, New Jersey, on October 21, 2024, SDL, a top provider of software solutions for local governments, unveiled its revamped website. The redesigned site focuses on providing customers with an improved and easier-to-navigate experience. The launch of the new website signifies SDL's commitment to enhancing user interaction and engagement.

news.headline: Millig Design Build chosen for WA State Capitol Campus decarbonization plan. Announced Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: In Seattle on October 21, 2024, Millig Design Build, an engineering and construction company, was chosen by the State of Washington as the main contractor and lead engineer for creating a detailed Decarbonization Master Plan.

news.headline: Precision Aviation Group acquires ICON Aerospace and TAG Aero, expanding airline avionics and engine services capabilities.
news.summary: Atlanta - On October 21, 2024, Precision Aviation Group, Inc. (PAG), a prominent company in the aerospace and defense industries, announced the acquisition of ICON Aerospace and TAG Aero. The move signifies a significant expansion of PAG's maintenance, repair, and overhaul capabilities. PAG, known for its high-quality services, aims to capitalize on the strengths of the acquired companies to better serve its global clientele. The acquisition underscores PAG's commitment to growth and excellence in the industry.

news.headline: FDA clears Adcentrx Therapeutics' IND for ADRX-0405, ADC targeting STEAP1 for cancer. Phase 1 trial starts in 4Q 2024.
news.summary: Adcentrx Therapeutics, a clinical-stage biotechnology company, has announced the clearance of an Investigational New Drug (IND) application for their second asset utilizing the ADC platform. The company anticipates dosing the first patient in a Phase 1a/b clinical trial by 4th quarter of 2024. This development signifies a significant milestone for Adcentrx, showcasing progress in their innovative drug development efforts.

news.headline: Kion debuts new CloudOps features at EDUCAUSE conference with IAM, compliance automation, and FinOps capabilities. Joined by Northwestern and Texas A&M University.
news.summary: In San Antonio, Kion has unveiled new IAM, compliance automation, and FinOps features at the EDUCAUSE event. The company also presented alongside Northwestern University and Texas A&M University, offering valuable insights.

news.headline: Nava Benefits launches AI-powered assistant by OpenAI to enhance employee benefits interaction.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a prominent employee benefits solutions provider, Nava Benefits, has introduced the Nava Benefits Assistant, which is driven by OpenAI. This innovative AI assistant aims to transform how employees engage with their benefits and workplace advantages. Equipped with various functionalities, the Nava Benefits Assistant simplifies benefits administration for users. It enables employees to access instant information on their deductible and out-of-pocket expenses, enhancing their benefits experience.

news.headline: CentralSquare unveils CitizenLink AI, cutting 911 wait times for non-emergency calls, aims to ease strain on understaffed 911 centers. Over 80% of U.S. centers are understaffed.
news.summary: CentralSquare Technologies unveiled CitizenLink AI™, a groundbreaking suite of AI-powered public safety tools at IACP 2024 in Boston. This marks the first of its kind in the U.S. CitizenLink AI™ is designed to integrate with various CentralSquare products such as Pro Suite, Enterprise Suite, ONESolution™, and Vertex™ NG911. By focusing on redirecting non-emergency 911 calls, the suite aims to improve response efficiency. A staggering 80% of 9-1-1 centers nationwide reveal severe understaffing issues, leading to extended wait times for citizens.

news.headline: Banijay Group reports average of 500 weekly share transactions among investors.
VEON begins delisting from Euronext Amsterdam to focus on Nasdaq trading. Last trading day on Euronext: Nov 22, delisting effective from Nov 25.
news.summary: VEON Ltd. has initiated the delisting process of its common shares from Euronext Amsterdam, as approved by the exchange. The company, a global digital operator listed on Nasdaq and Euronext Amsterdam under ticker symbol VEON, is set to conclude trading on Euronext Amsterdam on 22 November 2024. The official delisting will take effect three days later, on 25 November 2024.

news.headline: iGUIDE offers 3D tours of 3 haunted U.S. locations for Halloween.
news.summary: Planitar Inc., the company behind iGUIDE, is offering a virtual tour of three notoriously haunted locations in the United States as Halloween approaches.

news.headline: FHN Financial increases focus on municipal market, expands Public Finance Department with key hires in Project Finance.
news.summary: In Memphis, Tennessee on October 21, 2024, FHN Financial shared that its Public Finance Department has bolstered its Project Finance sector within the municipal market by welcoming new members to the team. FHN Financial Capital Markets has recently recruited a number of key professionals to enhance its offerings in this area.

news.headline: Kelley Blue Book lists best cars for teen drivers in 2024 to guide parents. Important milestone for parents with teen drivers.
news.summary: In Atlanta on October 21, 2024, a report highlighted the mixed emotions parents experience when their teenagers become new drivers. The milestone of obtaining a driver's license is both thrilling and daunting for many parents, as they must navigate various considerations before allowing their young drivers on the road. The report aims to provide guidance for parents during this significant time, coinciding with the celebration of National Teen Driver Safety Week.

news.headline: Maersk increases forecast due to rise in rates post Red Sea attacks.
Cointelegraph interviews congressional candidate John Avlon for his stance on crypto and blockchain ahead of the 2024 US Elections.
news.summary: Cointelegraph recently reached out to various congressional candidates to gather their stances on cryptocurrency and blockchain technology as they gear up for the upcoming 2024 US Elections. Many candidates were questioned about their perspectives on these digital assets and innovative technologies.

news.headline: Groundbreaking study by Amen Clinics reveals hidden impact of childhood trauma on brain function, shaping mental health.
news.summary: In Costa Mesa, California on October 21, 2024, a study conducted by Amen Clinics demonstrated the significant influence of adverse childhood experiences (ACEs) on brain function. This research provides essential understanding on how early trauma can influence mental health outcomes in adulthood. The findings were published today, shedding light on the lasting effects of ACEs on brain function.

news.headline: BLACK ENTERPRISE hosting 2024 Black Men XCEL Summit at JW Marriott Miami Turnberry Resort & Spa from Nov. 6–8. #CelebratingExcellence
news.summary: In Aventura, Florida, the 2024 Black Men XCEL Summit is set to take place from November 6 to 8 at the JW Marriott Miami Turnberry Resort & Spa. Hosted by BLACK ENTERPRISE, the event will focus on "Celebrating the Best of Who We Are." The summit is expected to draw a large crowd of attendees eager to participate in this premier gathering.

news.headline: Ropes & Gray law firm appoints 12 new partners effective Nov. 1, celebrating growth and future prospects.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, a global law firm, Ropes & Gray, announced the appointment of 12 new partners. The promotions will be effective from November 1. The firm expressed their excitement for the future with these additions, celebrating the achievements of their colleagues. Julie, a representative of the firm, shared the positive news.

news.headline: Luxury market shifting with a clear divide, loyal brands like Hermès set to outperform, while others face vulnerability.
news.summary: The luxury market is experiencing a significant shift, with a growing divide between established luxury brands like Hermès International SA and Ferrari N.V., which are expected to outperform due to loyal affluent customers, and aspirational brands like LVMH-Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton and Burberry Group plc, which face challenges from changing consumer behavior and economic slowdowns in markets like China and Europe. According to Maurits Pot, CEO of Tema ETFs, there is a clear distinction emerging between true luxury and aspirational brands in the industry. With companies like LVMH reporting disappointing results amid macroeconomic challenges, Pot suggests that investors focus on high-end brands rather than those reliant on discretionary spending. This analysis is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Stripe acquires Bridge for $1.1B, making it one of the biggest deals in crypto history after announcing stablecoin support.
news.summary: A recent agreement, considered one of the most substantial in the history of cryptocurrencies, comes shortly after Stripe revealed its backing of stablecoins at the beginning of this month.

news.headline: Hemlock secures $325M grant for Michigan chip facility, per Bloomberg.
3M shifts remote work policy, requiring managers in office 3 days/week
news.summary: Inflation soared to a 30-year high in the United States, with consumer prices rising by 7.5% in the past year. This is the biggest annual increase since 1982, driven in part by surging costs for gasoline and food. The sharp increase in inflation is putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates to combat rising prices. The cost of gas rose by 38% compared to last year, while food prices jumped by 6.3%. This surge in inflation is causing concerns among economists and policymakers about the impact on consumers and the overall economy.

news.headline: EverFree nonprofit premiered "Reclaiming Freedom" film highlighting human trafficking recovery in LA on Oct 19.
news.summary: A nonprofit organization in Los Angeles, EverFree, showcased its short film titled "Reclaiming Freedom" on Saturday, October 19. The film highlights support for survivors of human trafficking.

news.headline: Spirit Airlines saw its stock price soar significantly after securing a two-month extension on its debt repayment schedule.
Saia opens new terminals in Ohio & Kentucky to improve service, efficiency & quicker transit times for regional freight.
news.summary: The recent expansion of the company has boosted its regional freight capabilities, allowing for quicker transit times. This improvement in services is set to benefit a significant number of customers, with an increase in efficiency and speed in transit. This development showcases the company's commitment to meeting the growing demands of its clientele and enhancing overall operational effectiveness. With the upgraded infrastructure and facilities, the company is now equipped to handle a larger volume of freight, promising faster and more reliable delivery services. This strategic move is anticipated to significantly impact the company's market position and elevate its reputation in the industry.

news.headline: Allegra Stratton boosts UK investment on Bloomberg, making headlines.
AT&T, Verizon, and T-Mobile set to release earnings this week. Verizon expected to announce EPS of $1.18 and revenue of $33.43 billion.
news.summary: Telecom giants AT&T, Inc. (NYSE:T), Verizon Communications, Inc. (NYSE:VZ), and T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMUS) are all gearing up to release their earnings this week, drawing attention to their respective stock performances. Verizon is scheduled to announce its earnings on Tuesday before the market opens, with analysts predicting an EPS of $1.18 and revenue of $33.43 billion. In the previous quarter, Verizon recorded revenue of $32.79 billion and EPS of $1.15, aligning closely with estimates. Scotiabank analyst Maher Yaghi, while maintaining a Sector Perform rating on Verizon, increased the price target from $46.50 to $47.25. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US economy surprises with potential 3.4% Q3 growth, exceeding expectations with strong consumer spending, hinting at reacceleration.
news.summary: The U.S. economy is showing unexpected strength, shifting from concerns of a downturn to a potential reacceleration. Recent data, including better-than-expected GDP revisions, the September jobs report, and retail sales figures, are hinting at a robust economic performance. The Atlanta Fed's GDPNow model projects a 3.4% growth for third-quarter GDP, up from a 2.6% forecast a month ago. This would be the strongest performance since last year's 4.4% growth and surpasses the long-term average of 3.1%. The upward revision is attributed to stronger consumer spending, with real personal consumption expenditures forecasted to rise from 3.1% to 3.6%. The official data release is scheduled for Oct. 30.

news.headline: James Gorman named Disney chairman, replacing CEO Bob Iger in early 2026. Gorman, a director, will take over on Jan. 2, 2025.
news.summary: A significant change is happening on the board as James Gorman, who is responsible for planning the succession of CEO Robert A. Iger, will take on the role of chairman starting on January 2, 2025.

news.headline: Nvidia partnering with Aidoc to accelerate healthcare AI adoption through new framework BRIDGE, aiming for early 2025 release.
news.summary: Nvidia Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA) has revealed a collaboration with Aidoc, a healthcare AI startup, to enhance workflows, data precision, and patient care in healthcare facilities. Together, they are developing a new framework called “Blueprint for Resilient Integration and Deployment of Guided Excellence” (BRIDGE) to quicken the adoption of AI in the healthcare sector. The forthcoming guideline, expected to launch in early 2025, will offer a robust, evidence-based structure for seamlessly incorporating AI into clinical processes. This initiative is aimed at streamlining operations for healthcare organizations. Additionally, Microsoft has introduced AI tools for healthcare data analysis. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Mondelez sells 86M shares of JDE Peet's to JAB for 25.10 euros per share, increasing the free float.
news.summary: Mondelez International, Inc. (NASDAQ: MDLZ) witnessed a decline in share value as it made a deal to offload 86 million shares of JDE Peet’s to JAB at a rate of 25.10 euros ($27.16) per share. Moreover, JAB has dispersed JDE Peet’s shares to more than 70 limited partners of JAB Consumer Partners (JCP), significantly boosting the free float of JDE Peet’s. This distribution signifies the final allocation of JDE Peet’s shares to JCP investors. JAB, an investment holding firm focusing on insurance and consumer-centric sectors for sustainable growth, facilitated this transaction.

news.headline: Gilead/Merck's once-weekly HIV combo therapy sustains virus suppression to 48 weeks - 94.2% viral suppression at Week 48, zero with viral load ≥50 copies/mL. Presented at ID Week 2024. (Words: 30)
news.summary: Over the weekend, Gilead Sciences, Inc. and Merck & Co. Inc. shared results from a Phase 2 clinical trial at ID Week 2024. The study evaluated the combination of islatravir and lenacapavir. After 48 weeks, the combination maintained a 94.2% viral suppression rate in virologically suppressed adults (n=49), with HIV-1 RNA <50 copies/mL as a secondary endpoint. None of the participants had a viral load ≥50 copies/mL at Week 48. The trial involved 104 virologically suppressed adults in an open-label, active-controlled setting. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Turkey, a NATO member, eyes joining BRICS group, comprising Brazil, Russia, India, China, and South Africa.
BioSafe Systems introduces SaniDate® WTO, EPA-registered product to reduce foodborne pathogens in irrigation water for organic farming. Pioneering solution.
news.summary: In East Hartford, Connecticut, on October 21, 2024, BioSafe Systems made a significant announcement regarding their advancements in food safety management solutions for irrigation water. The groundbreaking label update specifically targets organic agriculture production. This development comes after extensive collaboration with both industry partners and universities over the course of several years. Keep in mind that BioSafe Systems is constantly leading the way in this area, showcasing their commitment to innovation and safety in the agricultural sector.

news.headline: LVMH launches international employee shareholding plan "LVMH Shares" for 70% of global workforce in 11 locations.
news.summary: Luxury conglomerate LVMH reveals the introduction of "LVMH Shares", a worldwide employee share ownership initiative targeting 70% of its employees globally. This program will be implemented across 11 different locations and regions spanning Europe, North America, and Asia.

news.headline: Witan PLC: Purchased [number] of its own shares as part of [transaction]. #alliance #shares
Quantum computer threat to crypto overstated. Bitcoin private keys safe for now, industry must move to post-quantum cryptography.
news.summary: Bitcoin's security remains intact for the foreseeable future as its private keys are not expected to be compromised. However, the industry must start migrating towards "post-quantum cryptography" to ensure long-term protection. This move is crucial as the value of Bitcoin has reached over $60,000, attracting significant attention from investors worldwide. The transition to advanced security measures will safeguard the approximately 18.7 million Bitcoins currently in circulation and maintain trust in the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Bitcoin falls by 3%, hitting sub-$65K targets due to US sellers, offering a buying opportunity with prices dropping below $67K. Traders caution further retracement possible.
news.summary: Investors were presented with a buying opportunity as Bitcoin experienced a brief drop below $67,000. However, market analysts are cautioning that the retracement in BTC's price may not have concluded yet.

news.headline: Global Silicon Carbide Semiconductor market is projected to reach a value of USD 11,783.1 Million by 2033, with a CAGR of 18.5% from 2024. The market was valued at USD 2,158.1 Million in 2023 and is expected to reach USD 2,557.3 Million in 2024. Rise in demand due to EVs, renewable energy, aerospace, and defense sectors driving growth. Expansion in 5G infrastructure also a key factor.esimal
news.summary: The article discusses the market insights on Silicon Carbide Semiconductor, indicating a current value of approximately USD 2,557.3 Million in 2024 and a projected worth of around USD 11,783.1 Million by 2033 with a CAGR of about 18.5%. The growth is attributed to factors like the demand for EVs/HEVs, expansion of renewable energy, advancements in power electronics, energy efficiency focus, aerospace/defense applications, and more. The market is expanding due to technological advancements, cost reductions, and high-frequency, high-temperature applications. Major partnerships and acquisitions in the sector include Wolfspeed's supply agreement with Renesas Electronics valued at USD 2 billion, ON Semiconductor's acquisition of GT Advanced Technologies Inc, and their expansion of a silicon carbide fabrication facility. Key segments analyzed in the report include components, products, wafer sizes, end-users, and regions.

news.headline: Trump is being sued for defamation by the exonerated 'Central Park Five'. Trump is facing a lawsuit for defamation from the exonerated 'Central Park Five'.
Ventana to ship Veyron V2 platform in 2025 with wide market acceptance from hyperscalers & HPC customers. RISC-V leader.
news.summary: A high-performance RISC-V leader, Ventana Micro Systems Inc., based in Cupertino, California, announced on October 21, 2024, that major hyperscalers and HPC customers are adopting the Veyron V2 Accelerated Compute Platform. This platform, which is open, scalable, and standards-based, is being utilized to drive AI, data center operations, and emerging workloads. The growing adoption of the Veyron V2 platform signifies a significant milestone for the company, with a strong acknowledgment from key players in the industry.

news.headline: Vietnam achieves milestone: eliminates trachoma, a painful disease affecting millions worldwide. Congrats!
news.summary: RTI International celebrates Vietnam's achievement in eradicating trachoma, a debilitating disease affecting millions globally. The nonprofit research institute based in Research Triangle Park, N.C. commends Vietnam for this milestone. This announcement was made on October 21, 2024. Trachoma elimination signifies a significant public health victory, offering relief to a substantial number of individuals worldwide.

news.headline: North Island Credit Union joins global celebration for International Credit Union Day, marking the 76th year on October 17, 2024.
news.summary: In San Diego, California, on October 21, 2024, North Island Credit Union participated in International Credit Union Day® on October 17, 2024, along with credit unions globally. This event, honoring the accomplishments and influence of the credit union movement, has been observed for the 76th year.

news.headline: Edenesque, a BIPOC, LGBTQ, and woman-owned mission-based company, launches new line of oat and pistachio milks in Buffalo, NY on Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: A newly launched mission-based company in Buffalo, NY, owned by BIPOC, LGBTQ, and women has introduced a new range of oat and pistachio milks. Edenesque, the plant-based milk company founded by a visionary chef, has officially launched its debut line on October 21, 2024. This company is dedicated to inclusivity and diversity with a stakeholder approach, showcasing the principles of BIPOC and LGBTQ ownership in the business sector. The unique dairy alternatives have gained much anticipation and are set to make a mark in the market.
